name: SIGINT Intercept Station
description: A signals intelligence facility that intercepts, decrypts, and analyzes enemy communications, radar emissions, and electronic transmissions. Provides real-time tactical and strategic intelligence.

specialAbilities.name: Communications Intercept
specialAbilities.description: Monitors and decrypts enemy military and diplomatic communications, revealing plans and force dispositions.

specialAbilities.name: ELINT Radar Mapping
specialAbilities.description: Maps enemy radar networks and electronic order of battle, enabling effective electronic warfare planning.
